prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: city zoom map plate for ASMR Shinkansen browser simulator
Primary request: Create a polished isometric pixel-art / early-2000s Japanese railway management simulator city map plate of the real Tokyo Station / Marunouchi / Yaesu / Nihonbashi area.
Geographic accuracy anchors: Tokyo Station is the central landmark; many north-south rail tracks run through the center; Marunouchi office district west of the station; Yaesu/Nihonbashi urban blocks east/northeast; Imperial Palace gardens/water west/northwest; road grid, canals, elevated expressways, compact urban blocks.
Subject: dense but readable city tiles, Tokyo Station platforms, Shinkansen rail corridor, conventional rail corridors, roads, trees, water, small traffic, station roofs, catenary gantries.
Style/medium: crisp 2D isometric pixel-art game map, late-1990s/early-2000s Japanese transport sim, detailed SimCity/A-Train style, cohesive authored sprite-map look, saturated but controlled colors, not photorealistic satellite imagery.
Composition/framing: 16:9 wide map plate, no UI panels, no labels, no text; leave enough open rail corridor through center for live train overlay.
Constraints: no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no checkerboard, no pasted cutout sprites, no giant trains, no floating icons; one coherent game world.
